estimate_disclaimers.flat_fee: This price is final for the described labor unless the scope changes on site. Materials (if any) are extra and will be confirmed before work begins.
estimate_disclaimers.hourly: Hourly services are billed for the actual time worked. Estimate based on typical durations; final amount may vary. Materials (if any) are extra.
estimate_disclaimers.project_based: All estimates are preliminary and non‑binding. Your final, binding price will be confirmed after our technician inspects the job site and you approve the exact scope and material selections. You are not committed until you accept the final quote.

meta.note: Removed legacy conditional_logic and pricing_model. Fully relying on inline effects.

category.name: Minor Home Repairs
category.description: Small-scale repairs for doors, walls, floors, appliances, and furniture.

category.name: Wall Mounting
category.description: Secure mounting of TVs, shelves, frames, blinds, and curtain rods.

category.name: Electric & Lighting
category.description: Light fixtures, switches, outlets, and ceiling fans.

category.name: Tech Trouble
category.description: Computer repair, networking, and smart home setup.

services.name: Door Lock or Handle Install
services.description: Install new door knob, lever, deadbolt, or hinges. Hardware is not included in price.

services.name: Door Weatherstripping
services.description: Install weatherstripping or door sweep to stop drafts.

services.name: Prehung Interior Door Install
services.description: Professional installation of a prehung interior door. Labor only; door and hardware not included. We’ll help you select the right door after measuring on site.

questions.label: Do you know the door size?

options.label: I don’t know – please measure on site

questions.label: Is the old door and frame already removed?

options.label: No, need to remove old frame (+$50)

materials.note: Hollow‑core doors start around $150; solid wood doors can exceed $400. Hardware extra. Exact cost depends on your choice.

total.note: Labor + typical materials range. Final price confirmed after measurement and door selection.

services.name: Door Repair Impact Damage
services.description: Cosmetic repair via patch and fill for hollow-core or solid-core door with impact/physical (non-structural) damage

services.name: Handyman Hourly – Custom Task
services.description: Mount anything, assemble non‑IKEA items, fix odd things, or tackle small projects. You describe the task; we handle the rest.

questions.label: What do you need done? (short description)
How long do you think it will take?
Do you have all necessary materials and parts?

options.label: No, please shop for me (parts charged at cost)

materials.note: Most small tasks use minimal materials. If significant supplies are needed, we’ll provide a separate estimate.

total.note: Typical range based on 1‑6 hours. Final billing based on actual time.

services.name: Half‑Day Handyman (4 Hours)
services.description: Reserve a handyman for a 4‑hour block to handle multiple small tasks, furniture assembly, mounting, and odd jobs. Any unused time is credited.

questions.label: Will you need the handyman to shop for parts?

options.label: Yes, please add Parts Fetching service

services.name: Full‑Day Handyman (8 Hours)
services.description: 8 hours of skilled help for larger projects, multiple installations, or full room makeovers. Unused time credited if job finishes early.

services.name: Parts Fetching / Shopping Trip
services.description: We’ll go to the hardware store and pick up the needed parts. Materials are billed at cost. One trip included.

materials.note: Parts cost will be added to your invoice; the $35 covers our time.

services.name: Pick‑Up & Drop‑Off (Single Trip)
services.description: We’ll pick up an item from one location and deliver it within the metro area. Useful for parts, appliances, or repaired devices.

total.note: Flat fee for one round‑trip within service area.
